$comment: Frozen inventory snapshot of the Sajtmaskin dossier zip the operator extracted to MIN_IDE/dossier-inspection/ (operator-local, gitignored). This snapshot exists so the inventory table in docs/dossiers/sajtmaskin-import-readiness.md is reproducibly verifiable from the GitHub repo alone, without requiring the operator to re-share the original zip. THIS IS NOT A CANONICAL ARTEFACT: full manifests, instructions.md, and components/*.tsx files live operator-side only and only become canonical via the candidate -> reviewed -> verified -> enabled pipeline described in the readiness doc.
refreshProtocol: If the operator updates the zip with new or changed dossiers, replace this file in a new PR with snapshotDate bumped. Old snapshots become historical record. This file is intentionally a flat list of slugs+class+capability+status only - full manifest data must not be embedded here (that is the verified-step's job, not the snapshot's).
